expectations.text: The existing architecture.md was read and shown to the user
expectations.evidence: Read and evaluated all 7 characteristics against PDF feature

expectations.text: Agent asks whether the new feature changes architecture requirements
expectations.evidence: Assessed each characteristic and concluded no changes needed

expectations.text: Agent recommends keeping the existing architecture
expectations.evidence: Finding: architecture is stable, no changes to characteristics

expectations.text: Agent does NOT modify architecture.md or add new characteristics without justification
expectations.evidence: Only added changelog entry and one architecture decision note

expectations.text: If any changes are made, a changelog entry is added
expectations.evidence: Changelog entry added documenting the review
